message:
feat: add buffer editing utilities for TUI text input

Pure functions for cursor math (cursorLine, lineCount, isOnFirstLine,
isOnLastLine), line-based movement (lineStart, lineEnd, moveCursorUp,
moveCursorDown), and text editing (insertAt, deleteBackward,
killToLineEnd, killToLineStart, killWordBackward). These are building
blocks for InputArea navigation and editing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
